title: FLOSS Weekly 339: Weave
summary:
Dan Lynch and Gareth talks to Ilya and Bryan about Weave.
Weave works with every application. Automatically. No extra code. No operational surprises. Simple, scalable, and fast.
Ilya Dmitrichenko is a Community Engineer at Weaveworks and Bryan Boreham is a Software Engineer for Weaveworks
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly.
Thanks to CacheFly for providing the bandwidth for this podcast, and Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
